styleGuide.descriptionRule: Explain what the item is, what it is used for, and why it matters in Econovaria without internal seed terminology.
styleGuide.artDirection: Grounded cyberpunk industrial catalog photography; dark near-future materials, neon faction accents, isolated readable objects, no people, labels, logos, or embedded text.

records.name: Precision Optical Glass
records.description: Optically pure glass blanks cut for inspection lenses, survey arrays, and high-resolution verification displays. Northreach fabricators prize the material for its low distortion and stable performance in extreme cold.
records.visualDescription: Stacked circular lens blanks with icy blue refraction and precision-machined edges.

records.name: Sensor Board
records.description: A compact sensor-control board that combines signal conditioning, diagnostics, and modular device connections. It is a standard building block for market lenses, logistics scanners, and environmental monitors.
records.visualDescription: Dense black circuit board with cyan sensor nodes, gold contacts, and modular ports.

records.name: Rare-Earth Concentrate
records.description: A refined mineral blend rich in the elements required for advanced optics, processors, and compact sensor assemblies. Supply is tightly controlled because small quantities support several high-value production chains.
records.visualDescription: Sealed graphite canister holding iridescent mineral concentrate and magnetic sample vials.

records.name: Cryogenic Ceramic
records.description: A low-expansion ceramic engineered to remain stable under severe temperature changes. It is used in insulated diagnostic tools, thermal barriers, and equipment designed for Northreach's cold industrial zones.
records.visualDescription: Pale ceramic tiles and machined rings with frost vapor and cyan edge lighting.

records.name: Superconductive Filament
records.description: A strategic conductor wound into protected spools for efficient power transfer and high-sensitivity instruments. Its demanding production process makes it one of Northreach's most valuable industrial exports.
records.visualDescription: Protected filament spool glowing faint electric blue inside a black containment frame.

records.name: Compressed Algae Fiber
records.description: A lightweight biomaterial pressed from cultivated algae into durable sheets and cordage. Yrethian manufacturers use it for filters, protective packaging, and low-mass structural panels.
records.visualDescription: Green-black fiber sheets, braided cord, and compressed blocks with teal bioluminescent accents.

records.name: Deepwater Lubricant
records.description: A pressure-stable industrial fluid formulated for hydraulic systems and machinery operating in wet or submerged environments. It protects moving parts from salt intrusion, heat buildup, and heavy-load wear.
records.visualDescription: Dark sealed lubricant cartridge with teal fluid chamber, pressure seals, and marine fittings.

records.name: Marine Seal Assembly
records.description: A replaceable mechanical seal set built for pumps, cargo monitors, and maritime tools. Multi-layer gaskets and corrosion-safe fittings keep equipment operational during long coastal and deepwater deployments.
records.visualDescription: Precision metal seal rings, polymer gaskets, and locking collar arranged as a compact kit.

records.name: Marine-Grade Resin
records.description: A high-bond resin that cures reliably in humid, salt-heavy conditions. It is used to seal cargo housings, repair maritime equipment, and protect electronics from water exposure.
records.visualDescription: Translucent teal resin cartridges, applicator, and cured waterproof sample plate.

records.name: Corrosion-Resistant Alloy
records.description: A nickel-rich alloy designed for ports, water systems, and exposed route infrastructure. It trades higher cost for long service life where ordinary metals would rapidly degrade.
records.visualDescription: Brushed alloy ingots and machined marine fittings with wet reflective highlights.

records.name: Thermal Gel
records.description: A reusable heat-transfer compound that moves thermal energy away from processors, cells, and power equipment. It is commonly packed into cooling modules and emergency stabilization kits.
records.visualDescription: Amber thermal gel capsules and a transparent cooling pad glowing from internal heat paths.

records.name: High-Density Carbon
records.description: A compressed carbon material used in battery structures, heat-resistant housings, and lightweight reinforced components. Its strength-to-weight ratio makes it central to Thaloris energy manufacturing.
records.visualDescription: Black carbon plates and woven composite samples with orange-hot edge reflections.

records.name: Thermal Regulator
records.description: An active control module that monitors temperature and redirects heat before equipment reaches damaging limits. It supports portable power banks, maintenance rigs, and precision instruments.
records.visualDescription: Compact regulator block with copper heat channels, amber status lights, and vented fins.

records.name: Catalytic Membrane
records.description: A strategic reactive membrane used to accelerate energy conversion and industrial filtration. Even minor contamination can ruin a batch, so intact sheets command a significant premium.
records.visualDescription: Layered metallic membrane disk with honeycomb microstructure and violet-orange catalytic glow.

records.name: Lithium Salt
records.description: Battery-grade lithium compound processed for energy cells, capacitor banks, and portable power systems. Demand rises sharply whenever transport or grid reliability deteriorates.
records.visualDescription: Sealed black sample jars containing pale crystalline salt, orange hazard lighting without labels.

records.name: Orbital-Grade Aluminum
records.description: A lightweight aluminum stock certified for precision frames, navigation consoles, and research equipment. Solvend mills control impurities closely so finished parts remain dependable under vibration and rapid temperature change.
records.visualDescription: Machined silver frame sections and billet with violet-blue aerospace inspection lighting.

records.name: Aerospace Composite
records.description: A layered structural composite that combines low mass with exceptional rigidity. It is used in portable research systems, navigation housings, and field equipment that cannot afford excess weight.
records.visualDescription: Dark woven composite panels, cutaway layers, and a lightweight angular instrument shell.

records.name: Radiation-Shielding Polymer
records.description: A dense flexible polymer formulated to protect sensitive electronics and field instruments from radiation exposure. It can be molded into secure enclosures without the weight of traditional shielding.
records.visualDescription: Graphite polymer panels with embedded metallic particles and violet dosimeter-like light accents.

records.name: Research Instrument Core
records.description: A calibrated instrument module containing precision timing, signal processing, and protected measurement interfaces. It turns a basic field terminal into a dependable scientific or verification tool.
records.visualDescription: Compact scientific core with crystal chamber, microconnectors, and controlled violet-blue illumination.

records.name: Research Crystal Substrate
records.description: A laboratory-grown substrate used in high-precision processors, verification equipment, and experimental instrument cores. Minute lattice defects can invalidate the material, making certified pieces scarce.
records.visualDescription: Transparent geometric crystal wafers in a black anti-vibration carrier with violet refraction.

records.name: Secure Ledger Substrate
records.description: A tamper-evident data material used in encrypted chips, audit equipment, and high-trust transaction hardware. Its layered conductive structure makes unauthorized physical modification easy to detect.
records.visualDescription: Dark multilayer data substrate with gold circuit traces and a locked holographic core.

records.name: Identity Laminate
records.description: A durable credential laminate built to hold secure printing, embedded verification marks, and authentication circuitry. It is used in permit cards, access credentials, and regulated equipment records.
records.visualDescription: Stack of blank dark credential cards with gold embedded mesh and subtle holographic edges.

records.name: Anti-Tamper Mesh
records.description: A fine conductive mesh installed around secure housings and contract-verification equipment. Cutting, drilling, or peeling the material breaks its monitored circuit pattern and exposes interference.
records.visualDescription: Flexible black mesh sheet with glowing gold circuit lattice wrapped around a secure module.

records.name: Encrypted Data Chip
records.description: A hardened storage and processing module designed for confidential financial, identity, and contract data. It supports secure terminals while limiting exposure if the device is removed or intercepted.
records.visualDescription: Black ceramic data chip in a gold-traced security cradle with a dim encrypted core glow.

records.name: Conductive Gold Foil
records.description: Ultra-thin gold conductor supplied for high-reliability contacts, secure processors, and precision financial hardware. It is expensive, but it resists oxidation and maintains stable signal paths.
records.visualDescription: Rolled gold microfoil, precision-cut contact strips, and a dark protective cassette.

records.name: Hydrophobic Sealant
records.description: A fast-curing sealant that forces water away from joints, housings, and emergency repairs. It is inexpensive, portable, and widely used to keep field equipment operational during storms and floods.
records.visualDescription: Cyan sealant cartridges and a waterproofed metal joint with water beading away.

records.name: Ceramic Filter Media
records.description: Porous ceramic pellets engineered to trap sediment and support chemical treatment inside compact filtration systems. Cartridges packed with the media are easy to service and transport.
records.visualDescription: Clean porous ceramic rings in a transparent cyan-lit filter cartridge.

records.name: Structural Glass Composite
records.description: A transparent reinforced panel that combines visibility with impact resistance. It is used for inspection windows, protected displays, and infrastructure modules exposed to debris or pressure changes.
records.visualDescription: Clear armored panel sample with layered edge, cyan fractures stopped inside the laminate.

records.name: Filtration Membrane
records.description: A high-grade membrane that removes fine contaminants from water-analysis and purification systems. Properly stored sheets are critical to public-health and environmental response work.
records.visualDescription: Rolled white-blue membrane, pleated cartridge, and microscopic filtration pattern under cyan light.

records.name: Pump Assembly
records.description: A compact pump module for water equipment, emergency infrastructure, and filtration loops. Standardized fittings allow crews to replace a failed unit without rebuilding the entire system.
records.visualDescription: Industrial compact pump with translucent cyan flow chamber and rugged quick-connect ports.

records.name: Archival Polymer Sheet
records.description: A stable transparent sheet made for long-lived records, field documents, and public information displays. It resists moisture, tearing, and discoloration better than ordinary paper.
records.visualDescription: Clear polymer document sheets in a dark case with magenta-cyan edge illumination.

records.name: Acoustic Fiber
records.description: A sound-control fiber used in communication panels, translation devices, and public-information equipment. The material reduces mechanical noise while keeping portable systems light.
records.visualDescription: Soft black acoustic fiber panels with visible wave pattern and magenta-cyan sound pulses.

records.name: Adaptive Textile Mesh
records.description: A flexible technical fabric that changes tension across its weave to protect tools and organize field kits. It is lightweight enough for portable work while resisting repeated abrasion.
records.visualDescription: Folded dark smart textile with reactive cyan-magenta weave and modular equipment pockets.

records.name: Educational Display Film
records.description: A thin programmable display material used for learning interfaces, public briefings, and portable contract tools. It can present changing diagrams and instructions without a rigid screen.
records.visualDescription: Rolled translucent display film showing abstract cyan-magenta interface light with no text.

records.name: Learning Interface Module
records.description: A compact interface core that powers interactive training tools, research terminals, and public briefing stations. It combines touch input, accessible feedback, and local content storage.
records.visualDescription: Slim black interface module with cyan-magenta touch surface and modular education ports.

records.name: Universal Fastener Set
records.description: A standardized collection of bolts, clamps, anchors, and locking hardware used across repair and fabrication work. The broad compatibility makes it a dependable input for emergency maintenance.
records.visualDescription: Organized black metal case of cyber-industrial bolts, clamps, and locking fasteners with red-orange accents.

records.name: Hydraulic Fluid
records.description: A high-load fluid formulated for actuators, maintenance rigs, and construction machinery. It maintains pressure under heat and protects pumps and valves from internal wear.
records.visualDescription: Rugged dark hydraulic-fluid canister with red-orange pressure window and reinforced couplings.

records.name: Reinforced Concrete Additive
records.description: A powdered and liquid additive package that improves concrete strength, curing control, and resistance to cracking. It is essential for fast infrastructure repairs and field supports.
records.visualDescription: Sealed additive bags, dosing vial, and a fractured concrete sample reinforced by orange fibers.

records.name: Machine Steel Billet
records.description: Dense steel stock prepared for cutting into machine parts, fabricator frames, and warehouse hardware. Its predictable composition reduces tool wear and production defects.
records.visualDescription: Heavy machined steel billets on a dark industrial pallet with red-orange scanner lines.

records.name: Industrial Bearing Stock
records.description: Pre-hardened rings and races used to manufacture replacement bearings for motors, fabricators, and warehouse systems. Keeping this stock available prevents small failures from stopping entire production lines.
records.visualDescription: Precision bearing rings, rollers, and unfinished races with red-orange industrial lighting.

records.name: Iron Ore Concentrate
records.description: Upgraded ore with most waste rock removed, ready for efficient smelting into steel. It is a foundational Dravenlok export and a common starting point for heavy-industry supply chains.
records.visualDescription: Dark granular ore concentrate in rugged bins with crimson furnace reflections.

records.name: Refined Alloy Ingot
records.description: A uniform metal ingot blended for equipment frames, repair kits, and industrial fabrication. Its certified composition gives builders more reliable strength than mixed scrap.
records.visualDescription: Stacked dark alloy ingots stamped only with abstract marks, crimson edge glow, no readable text.

records.name: Hardened Steel Plate
records.description: Heat-treated plate designed for structural scanners, maintenance rigs, and heavy protective housings. It is difficult to machine but withstands severe impact and repeated load cycles.
records.visualDescription: Thick armored steel plates with beveled edges, heat discoloration, and crimson highlights.

records.name: Industrial Coke Composite
records.description: A high-carbon industrial feedstock optimized for foundry heat, structural reinforcement, and high-temperature processing. It burns and reacts more consistently than untreated coke.
records.visualDescription: Black porous composite briquettes in a heatproof tray with deep red furnace glow.

records.name: Structural Reinforcement Kit
records.description: A field-ready package of braces, plates, anchors, and joining hardware for urgent structural repairs. Crews use it to stabilize warehouses, equipment mounts, and damaged infrastructure.
records.visualDescription: Compact armored repair crate opened to show braces, plates, anchors, and crimson-lit tools.

records.name: Broadcast Fiber
records.description: A high-bandwidth optical fiber designed for public information systems, emergency receivers, and communication arrays. It carries dense signals over long routes with minimal loss.
records.visualDescription: Coiled black optical fiber with electric violet-blue light traveling through the strands.

records.name: Photonic Film
records.description: A strategic optical layer that controls and redirects light inside advanced displays, verification tools, and broadcast equipment. Clean film is difficult to manufacture and easily damaged by contamination.
records.visualDescription: Iridescent photonic film sheets bending violet-blue light into sharp geometric patterns.

records.name: Signal-Grade Silicon
records.description: High-purity silicon wafers selected for communication processors, verification terminals, and signal-control hardware. Stable electrical behavior makes it more valuable than general electronic feedstock.
records.visualDescription: Dark silicon wafers with etched circuits and electric violet-blue reflected patterns.

records.name: Encryption Crystal Matrix
records.description: A precision crystal lattice used in secure communication and data-protection equipment. Its physical structure supports unique signal behavior that is difficult to duplicate or intercept.
records.visualDescription: Faceted black-violet crystal matrix suspended in a secure frame with electric blue data arcs.

records.name: Secure Communications Blueprint
records.description: A controlled technical authorization package for constructing hardened communication equipment. It contains validated layouts, component requirements, and security procedures rather than physical hardware.
records.visualDescription: Sealed black data tablet and holographic circuit plan with violet-blue glow, no readable text.
